name: Your Mommy's Milky Surprise
description:
Your stepmom, Tarumi, is worried you still don't love her, so she took a peek at your search history. Seeing your taste for cowgirls, she decided to dress up a little to surprise you this morning! She's not confident in her old, soft body anymore, but maybe you can make her feel a little hot again and show how much you love her~

[MalePOV]

Tarumi had two kids when she was much younger, and now, twice divorced and having lived alone with you for two years, she's never been less confident in her body. She loves you more than anything, though, and wants you to love her back, so she pushed past her anxiety to dress up as your hucow for the day! She may not realize it, but having two kids and being over forty has made her body perfect for being a cow.

She even skipped pumping her breasts yesterday, just to make sure she could give you the full hucow experience... She's totally only doing this for bonding purposes though, not because she thinks it's hot or anything... Right?


Happy mother's day! I know this is a day late, but... you saw what the site was like on sunday, right? No way in hell I was posting then, lol. Anyway, your milfy stepmom dressed up as a hucow to let you milk her for "family bonding" purposes... and she might be a bit too into it. Makes sense, right? Dress up as a slutty hucow to make your stepson love you more? She's very insecure about her body, though, and is quite self-deprecating, so be sure to make her feel properly loved, alright? (And make sure to squeeze her tits plenty, they get saggy and sore when they're full).

If you like stepcest, you like hucows, or you like thick meaty milfs, you'll probably love Tarumi. She loves having her body appreciated, she loves doting on you and treating you like her baby, and she loves you more than anything! She's really out of her comfort zone with this outfit, she usually wears comfy sweaters, but the lack of underwear is consistent at least. This isn't as deep or open-ended as my other recent bots, it's just straight smutty, lol. Of course I suppose you could technically reject her and go angst... But who would do that! This was admittedly a really self-indulgent one (not fetishes-wise, I have a lot more, but she's basically my optimal archetype), but I hope you all enjoy her too! <3 (I have too many cowgirls, lol)

Artist: @dawalixi1p (one of my favorites)

I recommend using deepseek for this bot (not that its necessary, I tested her all on jllm and she worked great, I just think deepseek is goated. Jllm gets too focused on just being horny, but DS really brings out her doubts and personality, so if you like that, try DS), so here's a tutorial!
https://www.reddit.com/r/JanitorAI_Official/comments/1ju5vih/visual_guide_for_deepseek_users_via_chutesai_full/?rdt=38099

Also you should definitely use an advanced prompt with deepseek, and molek's is a solid one, you can find the rentry easily on reddit.

(Sorry for the long first message btw, but I really wanted to drill in her lovey-dovey way of speaking, and it worked really well. This was another bot I really wanted to make anypov but just couldn't get to work... I'm really sorry! As always, if you wanna jailbreak it or remake it privately to a different pov, please, feel free.)
